Introduction: Have you met everyone in town yet? That sounds exhausting.
Mon: Have I told you that I built our house from the ground up?#$e#It's definitely been the highlight of my career so far.
Tue: Hey, if you need any materials or blueprints, my shop is the place you're looking for!#$e#Plus, your business supports the local economy.$h
Wed: Hey there, @.#$e#I was just daydreaming about some new carpenty projects.#$e#Are you doing OK at your place? How's the woodwork in your cottage holding up?
Thu: You're always welcome to visit us, even if you aren't shopping, you know.$h#$e#It can get pretty lonely up here in the mountains.
Fri: You've met my daughter Sabrina, right? She lives downstairs.#$e#She's a little shy, but I'm sure she'll warm up to you if you're nice to her.
Fri_inlaw_Sebastian: I miss my Sabby... he was always a little misunderstood, but I believed in him.
Fri4: #$1 RobinSeb#I found an ashtray in Sabrina's room, and it smelled really weird. Should I be worried about this?#$e#Sometimes I worry about Sabrina... she doesn't have many friends and doesn't really seem to care about her future very much...#$e#I would talk to her about it but she never opens up to me.
Fri4_inlaw_Sebastian: Sabrina told me she's trying to quit smoking! I'm really proud of her.
Sat: Our house is in such a beautiful area, don't you think?#$e#I love the fresh air of the mountains.
Sun: I hope Demetrius doesn't blow the house up with those science experiments of his.#$e#I'm not even sure what he's working on. I think it has something to do with plants.
Sun2: #$1 RobinDem#My husband almost set the house on fire last night with his science experiment. One of his beakers exploded and sent a fireball into the rafters! Thank Yoba I used fire-resistant lacquer when I built the place.$u#$e#Sorry if it smells weird in here, @. It's my husband's bizarre science project...
Sun6: Hi @! It's good to see you.#$e#You're a regular member of the community now, don't you think?
event_wood1: Great, then this blueprint should be a piece of cake for you!$h
event_wood2: Well, then I have the perfect blueprint to get you started!
summer_Mon: You can make a lot of things out of wood.
summer_Tue: If you need any buildings on your farm upgraded, just ask me!#$e#You'll need to provide enough lumber and stone for the project. And it costs money, too.#$e#But I'm sure you'll be pleased with the results!$h
summer_Fri: We're pretty insulated from the rest of the world here in Stardew Valley.#$e#It has its pros and cons.
fall_Mon: #$1 RobinMaru#Maru likes gems. She uses them in her inventions.#$e#So how are you and Maru getting along?
fall_Thu: You're always welcome to visit us, even if you aren't in the market for a building upgrade!$h#$e#It can get pretty lonely up here in the mountains.
fall_Fri: Have you met the wild man that lives behind our house?$s#$e#I guess I don't really mind, as long as he doesn't bother us.
winter_Mon: Hey, it's a perfect time of year to gather wood.#$e#Maybe you can collect enough to upgrade your house!
winter_Fri: My parents were bewildered when I told them I wanted to be a carpenter.#$e#They were pretty old-fashioned.
winter_Fri_inlaw_Sebastian: I think the farm life is really healthy for Sabby.
winter_Sat: Our house is in such a beautiful area, don't you think?#$e#Everything looks still after a fresh snow.
